error_signature: no output port on webhook trigger
title: No output port visible on Webhook Trigger
symptom: The Webhook Trigger node does not display an output port for connecting to subsequent nodes, despite receiving webhooks successfully.
not_this_if: Output port is visible in other nodes
root_cause: The absence of an output port can be caused by a Content Security Policy (CSP) misconfiguration in the nginx setup, which prevents the proper rendering of the node's output ports in the n8n interface.
fix_steps: Check the nginx configuration file for CSP settings
Adjust the CSP to allow necessary resources
Refresh the n8n interface and check the Webhook Trigger node again
agent_instruction: Review and update the CSP settings in your nginx configuration to resolve the output port issue.
